metadata.title: Civilizations of the Alberta Social Studies Curriculum (Grade 5/6)
metadata.description: Historical boundary polygons for civilizations and empires named in the Alberta Social Studies curriculum. Each polygon shows the civilization at its classical or peak era. Boundaries from aourednik/historical-basemaps (MIT licensed), which compiles georeferenced borders from multiple scholarly sources.

properties.name: Achaemenid Persian Empire
properties.era: c. 500 BCE — Reign of Darius I

properties.name: Mali Empire
properties.era: c. 1300 CE — Reign of Mansa Musa

properties.name: Songhai Empire
properties.era: c. 1500 CE — Reign of Askia Muhammad
